title: First-Time Motherhood and Breastfeeding: 8 Herbal Creams for Nipple Pain
description: Arnica montana creams are a popular natural remedy for nipple pain during breastfeeding. The reason why they're so effective is due to their anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm sore nipples. Arnica montana contains compounds like sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which are known for their ability to reduce swelling and ease pain. When applied to the nipple area, these creams can help to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and provide relief from discomfor...
